domain: Persian Kashan/Yazd qanat + ab-anbar water-supply system (UNESCO 1506): underground horizontal aqueduct tunnel from alluvial aquifer mother-well + regular vertical vent/spoil shafts + gravity-only flow over km; downstream jubs surface canals + kariz urban distribution; ab-anbar cisterns at intervals (below-ground, sarooj-mortar impermeable walls) + wind-tower atop drawing cool air from qanat tunnel (pressure differential cooling water to ~25C in 45C desert); 30000 active Iranian qanats
specific_mechanism: KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW: multi-stage cistern-buffer information cascade with wind-tower thermal damping. (1) Mother well I = input layer (raw token stream high-density). (2) Underground tunnel T = stage-1 hidden axis with gravity-driven information flow (residual-stream-like no-compute pure routing). (3) Regular vent shafts V_1,...,V_M = per-stage sampling/inspection ports for diagnostic readout + optional layer-norm injection without disrupting main flow. (4) K stacked ab-anbar cisterns C_1,...,C_K at intervals = context-buffer chambers, each C_k aggregates information accumulated since C_{k-1} via attention-pooled summary; downstream stage reads only from C_k (not full tunnel) for parsimony. (5) Wind-tower thermal damping: at each C_k, cross-attention with cool-reference embedding e_cool (long-term anchor) reduces activation 'temperature' (variance) — L_thermal = sum_k ||C_k - cool_proj(C_k)||^2. (6) Sarooj-mortar buffer-boundary: between cisterns C_k and C_{k+1}, no leakage except through learned outlet projection W_out_k — controlled controlled gradient bottleneck. (7) Differs from R413 CHASQUI (relay-runner discrete pass-through) + R422 + R429 KAMI-SHIBAI + R438 PIROGUE + R455 HAUSA-CASCADE + R480 RINGDANS (synchronous chorus) + R493 EISTEDDFOD (tournament cascade) by cistern-buffer aggregation + wind-tower thermal damping + vent-shaft diagnostic-readout combination.
llm_application: KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW multi-stage K-cistern context-buffer chamber + wind-tower thermal-damping cool-reference cross-attention + vent-shaft per-stage diagnostic-readout + sarooj impermeable buffer-boundary learned-outlet controlled-bottleneck + gravity-only residual-routing main axis. Differs from R413 CHASQUI relay-runner (sequential discrete). R422. R429 KAMI-SHIBAI. R438 PIROGUE. R455 HAUSA. R480 RINGDANS chorus. R493 EISTEDDFOD tournament. Differs from Unified Cascade Routing OpenReview ICLR 2025 + HERMES Multi-Stage MIT 2025 + Self-Aware EMNLP 2025 + StreamingLLM attention-sink + LLM Context Strategies 2026 by cistern-chamber aggregation + wind-tower thermal damping + vent-shaft diagnostic-readout + sarooj impermeable controlled-bottleneck. Differs by CISTERN BUFFER-AGGREGATION + WIND-TOWER THERMAL-DAMP + VENT-SHAFT DIAGNOSTIC + SAROOJ BOUNDARY.
novelty_claim: Cascade Routing + HERMES + Self-Aware Routing + StreamingLLM + LLM Context Strategies cover multi-stage cascade space. KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW adds (a) multi-stage cistern context-buffer chamber + (b) wind-tower thermal-attention damping + (c) vent-shaft per-stage diagnostic-readout + (d) sarooj impermeable buffer boundary. Recombination — borderline lookup.
